description: Priority 1 continued: AI Predictive Care Engine - Frontend dashboard page with risk scores per resident, alerts panel, and trend visualization. Add types, API client, hooks, page component, and navigation entry.
steps: Add TypeScript types to frontend/src/types/index.ts: PredictiveRiskScore (id, resident_id, resident_name, room_number, risk_type, score, factors, generated_at), PredictiveAlert (id, resident_id, resident_name, room_number, alert_type, risk_score, threshold, factors, status, created_at, acknowledged_by_name), PredictiveRiskDashboard (residents array with falls_score, deterioration_score, combined_risk, last_analyzed).
Add API client methods to frontend/src/services/api.ts: predictiveApi object with getDashboard, getResidentRisk, getResidentHistory, getAlerts, acknowledgeAlert, runAnalysis.
Add React Query hooks to frontend/src/hooks/index.ts: usePredictiveRiskDashboard, usePredictiveAlerts, useResidentRiskHistory, useRunPredictiveAnalysis, useAcknowledgePredictiveAlert.

Create frontend/src/pages/PredictiveCare.tsx: A full page with tabs for (1) Risk Dashboard - table/cards showing all residents with their falls and deterioration scores color-coded (green <30, amber 30-70, red >70), sortable by risk. (2) Active Alerts - list of triggered alerts with acknowledge button. (3) Resident Detail - select a resident and see their risk history chart (simple bar/timeline visualization using divs, no chart library needed). Include a 'Run Analysis' button that triggers batch processing. Follow the existing inline-style pattern from AiInsights.tsx.

Register the page in frontend/src/App.tsx: (1) Add import for PredictiveCare page. (2) Add nav item in NAV_ALL under 'Tools' section: { path: '/predictive-care', label: 'Falls & Risk AI', icon: '🎯', roles: ['home_manager','deputy_manager','registered_nurse','super_admin','group_admin'] }. (3) Add Route: <Route path='/predictive-care' element={<PredictiveCare />} />.
acceptance_criteria: PredictiveCare page renders with 3 tabs (Risk Dashboard, Alerts, Resident Detail)
API client methods exist in api.ts for all predictive endpoints
Nav item appears in sidebar under Tools
Frontend builds successfully with npm run build
